caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black headset with an attached microphone is positioned against a plain, light-colored wall. He is the only person visible. Across the sequence, he is speaking and gesturing. Initially, he looks forward with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he opens his mouth to speak and begins to move his right hand toward his face. By the end, he has raised his right hand, pointing his index finger upward near his cheek while continuing to talk. The text "Ashish Raichur" is visible in the bottom left corner of each shot. The camera angle remains a steady medium close-up, focusing on his head and shoulders throughout the clip.
